questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 4 của test5.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a new doctor.
The woman thinks

options.text: he's too young.
he'll probably be busy.
he doesn't listen to his patients.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 11 của test5.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a storm.
The man says

options.text: the storm was worse in the north.
the next storm is going to be even worse.
the storm will last until the end of the week.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 12 của test5.

questions.content:
You will hear a woman telling a friend about her noisy neighbours.
What is the woman planning to do?

options.text: Ask them to be quiet.
Offer to have them for a meal.

Get her husband to knock on their door.
116

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 13 của test5.

options.text: he would have done even better if the internet had existed.
it was difficult to focus during his studies.
online learning is more effective.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 14 của test5.

questions.content: Why does Penelope say about managing revision?

options.text: You should never revise just before an exam.
Try to do it over a period of time.
Only make notes occasionally.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 22 của test5.

questions.content: Penelope thinks listening to music while revising

options.text: does not help.
is OK if you listen to tunes you love.
needs to be researched.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 24 của test5.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about keeping fit.
What does the man say about swimming?

options.text: He doesn't think the woman should try it.
Ifs the best form of exercise.
The new swimming pool gets crowded.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 9 của test5.

questions.content:
You will hear a woman telling a friend about a handbag.
What does she say?

options.text: It is damaged.
It costs a lot to return it.
The one she has now is the wrong colour.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 10 của test5.

options.text: explaining things to others can help you understand the subject.
friends or relatives might be able to explain things to you.
reading something more than once never works.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 21 của test5.

questions.content: What does Penelope say about some subjects?

options.text: You should avoid studying boring subjects.
They can be difficult if you don't find them interesting.
Everyone has a subject they don't find interesting.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 23 của test5.

options.text: Learning lists can help you remember.
Imagine yourself being successful.

Use creative ways to help you remember key points.
118
